title: Duplicate login guard
description: Prevent the same user from logging in twice or entering the online-user set multiple times, with a clear error response.
success_criteria: Duplicate login attempts return a clear error such as USER_ONLINE.
The online-user set cannot contain duplicate or stale entries for the same active user.
Persistence and match logic are not modified.
risk_points: Disconnect/logout paths can leave stale online state.
Changing authentication flow can break valid login attempts.
